case_title: GE MONEY BANK VS. VERONICA ANDAL et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GE MONEY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ANDAL, VERONICA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-04-2009

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
